list.name: activity
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT s.site_type::text FROM monitoring.sites s JOIN monitoring.fact_site_event f ON f.site_id = s.site_id ORDER BY 1;

list.name: vo
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') AS vo FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${activity:text}') ORDER BY 1;

list.name: site
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT s.description FROM monitoring.sites s JOIN monitoring.fact_site_event f ON f.site_id = s.site_id WHERE ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${activity:text}') AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${vo:text}') ORDER BY 1;

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.site_id) AS value FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${vo:text}') AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${activity:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.description = '${site:text}');

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.site_type::text) AS value FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${vo:text}') AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${activity:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.description = '${site:text}');

SELECT ROUND((SUM(COALESCE(f.energy_wh,0)))::numeric,3) AS value FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${vo:text}') AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${activity:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.description = '${site:text}');

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${vo:text}') AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${activity:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.description = '${site:text}');

SELECT ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(f.cfp_g,0)), 3) AS value FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${vo:text}') AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${activity:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.description = '${site:text}');

SELECT s.site_type::text AS site_type, COUNT(*) AS events, ROUND((SUM(COALESCE(f.energy_wh,0)))::numeric,3) AS energy_wh FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${vo:text}') AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${activity:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.description = '${site:text}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY energy_wh DESC;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(f.event_start_timestamp, $__interval), SUM(COALESCE(f.energy_wh,0)) AS energy_wh, SUM(COALESCE(f.cfp_g,0)) AS cfp_g FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${vo:text}') AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${activity:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.description = '${site:text}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(dg.ncores,0)),0) AS value FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id LEFT JOIN monitoring.detail_grid dg ON dg.event_id = f.event_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${vo:text}') AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${activity:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.description = '${site:text}');

SELECT ROUND((SUM(COALESCE(f.work,0)))::numeric,3) AS value FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${vo:text}') AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${activity:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.description = '${site:text}');

panels.title: Sites in Selected VO (click site for monitoring detail)

targets.rawSql: SELECT s.description AS site, s.site_type::text AS site_type, COUNT(*) AS jobs, ROUND((SUM(COALESCE(f.energy_wh,0)))::numeric,3) AS energy_wh, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(f.cfp_g,0)),3) AS cfp_g, COUNT(DISTINCT f.execunitid) AS monitoring_points FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${vo:text}') AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${activity:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.description = '${site:text}') GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY energy_wh DESC;
